steps.title: Use the disposal context
steps.content: The devices are thrown away when their batteries stop working, and the blank follows "becoming harmful." The noun must describe discarded material that can harm the environment.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: Choice A is guidance, which devices cannot become. Choice C means benefits or prizes, opposite the negative context. Choice D means locations or roles and does not fit discarded electronics. The answer is B.
